-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR do and why? Focus on the *why*. -->

## Related Issue

<!-- Linking an issue closes it on merge. -->

Closes #

## Type of Change

<!-- Tick all that apply -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing behavior)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / code cleanup
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Tests
- [ ] 🔧 Chore / tooling / dependency update

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch follows the naming convention (`feat/`, `fix/`, `docs/`, etc.)
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with no new warnings
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] I have performed a **self-review** of my own code
- [ ] I have updated relevant docs (`README.md`, `docs/*`) where behavior changed
- [ ] I have not committed any secrets, `.env*`, or service-role keys
- [ ] New code paths are covered by tests where appropriate

## Screenshots / Recording (UI changes only)

     For animated UI, a video is much more useful than a static frame. -->

| ------ | ----- |
|        |       |
